name: Televisions
description: Premium LG 2025 TVs — self-lit OLED, MiniLED-backed QNED evo, and NanoCell 4K AI TVs with Alpha AI processing.

name: Washer & Dryers
description: LG WashTower all-in-one stacked washer-dryers with AI Direct Drive, TurboWash 360 and heat-pump drying.

name: Refrigerators
description: LG InstaView French door refrigerators with LinearCooling, DoorCooling+ and Smart Inverter compressors.

name: Dishwashers
description: Freestanding LG dishwashers with TrueSteam hygienic cleaning, QuadWash multi-direction spray arms and 14 place settings.

name: Water Purifiers
description: LG PuriCare water purifiers — tankless, UVnano-protected systems delivering instant hot, cold and ambient water with smart inverter compressors.

name: Air Purifiers
description: LG PuriCare air purifiers with H13 HEPA filtration, UVnano sterilisation and Clean Booster — from slim tower models to pet-friendly Alpha Pet and the unique AeroCatTower.

name: Air Conditioners
description: LG DUAL Inverter split air conditioners from 1.0HP to 2.5HP, including the mirrored-glass ARTCOOL range. Fast cooling, low noise, Plasmaster ionisation and 10-year compressor warranty.

name: Dehumidifiers
description: LG PuriCare dehumidifiers with Dual Inverter compressor, ThinQ app control, and 10-year compressor warranty.

name: Vacuum Cleaners
description: LG CordZero cordless stick vacuums with auto-empty tower, UVC LED sanitisation and steam mop attachments.

name: Microwaves
description: LG NeoChef Smart Inverter microwave ovens — precise power control, even heating, and easy-clean interior.

name: Styler
description: LG Styler smart wardrobes refresh, sanitise and gently dry clothes at home using TrueSteam — no detergents required.

name: Monitors
description: LG Smart Monitors with 4K touchscreen, rolling stands, webOS 24 and USB-C power delivery — work, stream and control your smart home from one screen.

name: Audio
description: LG XBOOM portable speakers tuned by will.i.am — rugged, AI audio-tuned, and built for outdoor use.

name: Massage Chairs
description: LG AI Massage Recliners with 3D massage, brainwave-guided relaxation and personalised programmes — designed as furniture-style recliners.
